title: Implement OAuth2 middleware
body: Add OAuth2 bearer token middleware with JWT validation and refresh token support.
acceptance_criteria: All auth tests pass and middleware handles edge cases

title: Safe migration system
body: Build auto-migration in dev with safe apply in production. Support both SQL and Go migration files.
acceptance_criteria: Migrations generate correctly and apply safely in CI

title: WebSocket real-time invalidation
body: Automatic cache invalidation via WebSocket rooms when entities are mutated.

title: Block model v2 implementation
body: Universal block tree with source resolution and SDK integration for config-driven pages.
acceptance_criteria: All block types render correctly from YAML config

title: Admin redesign phase 1
body: ClickUp-inspired admin with two-panel sidebar and YAML-driven pages.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard and entity pages look production-ready

title: Type-safe SDK hooks
body: Generate TypeScript types from entity schemas for fully typed useQuery/useAction hooks.
acceptance_criteria: No any types in consuming code

title: Seeding system
body: Three-layer seeding: initial/sample/demo with faker tags and CSV export.
acceptance_criteria: Seed commands work for all entity types

title: Job runtime and scheduling
body: Background job processing with retry logic and dead letter queue.
acceptance_criteria: Jobs execute reliably with proper failure handling

title: End-to-end test framework
body: Integration test harness using yolotest package with real DB.
acceptance_criteria: All critical paths covered with e2e tests

title: MCP adapter for factory
body: Model Context Protocol adapter to expose factory actions as MCP tools.
acceptance_criteria: Factory actions callable via MCP from any agent
